'''Iotra''' was the fifth planet in the [[Iotran system]] and the temperate, industrial homeworld to the militant [[Iotran/Legends|Iotran]] species. The planet was ruled by the [[Joint Council]], eight top-ranking leaders of the [[Iotran Police Force]] (IPF).

The southern latitudes of the planet were plagued by the seasonal [[East Vacaliv]] wind storms; the IPF often needed to provide rescue operations during these storms.

{{Planet-stub}}
